name: DMS Document Tools
description: Provides tool access to the personal document archive via dms_ai_bridge. Select the appropriate action and supply the matching parameters. Actions: search_documents (requires: query), list_filter_options (no extra params), get_document_details (requires: document_id), get_document_full (requires: document_id; optional: start_char).
author: dms_ai_bridge

input.hint: Base URL of the dms_ai_bridge server
X-Api-Key header value for dms_ai_bridge authentication
Your AnythingLLM user ID (must be mapped in config/user_mapping.yml on the bridge server)
Maximum number of documents to return per search

examples.prompt: Search my documents for invoices from last year
What correspondents and document types do I have?
Show me the details of document 42
Read the full text of document 42

action.description: Tool action to perform: search_documents | list_filter_options | get_document_details | get_document_full

query.description: Natural language search query — required for search_documents

document_id.description: DMS document ID from search results — required for get_document_details and get_document_full

start_char.description: Character offset to start reading from — optional, for get_document_full pagination (default: 0)
